name: FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg
description: Bavaria's second largest university, strong in engineering, CS, medicine and natural sciences. FAU has strong industry ties with Siemens and Adidas headquartered nearby.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Ruhr University Bochum
description: One of Germany's largest universities, part of the University Alliance Ruhr. Strong in engineering, IT security and neurosciences. Home to Horst Görtz Institute for IT Security.

admission_requirements.language: IELTS 6.5 or TestDaF TDN 4 for German programs
admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Cologne
description: One of Germany's oldest and largest universities. Excellent for business informatics, economics, and natural sciences. Located in Germany's fourth largest city with strong industry connections.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Münster
description: Comprehensive university consistently ranked among Germany's top. Strong in IT, geoinformatics, and life sciences. Beautiful student city with low cost of living.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Goethe University Frankfurt
description: Located in Germany's financial capital. Excellent for computer science, finance & informatics, and physics. Close proximity to Europe's largest financial hub gives outstanding career opportunities.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Göttingen
description: Historic research university with 47 Nobel Prize winners among its alumni. Excellent in applied mathematics, physics, data science and agricultural sciences.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Tübingen
description: World-renowned for AI and machine learning research. Home to the Max Planck Institute for Intelligent Systems and Bernhard Schölkopf's group. One of Germany's excellence initiative universities.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants
admission_requirements.degree: BSc in CS, Maths or related

name: University of Duisburg-Essen
description: Part of the University Alliance Ruhr. Strong in engineering, computer science and economics. Offers several English-taught master's programs and is known for international orientation.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Paderborn University
description: Known as 'The University of Information Society'. Germany's leading university for computer science education and IT research. Home to Heinz Nixdorf Institute and strong CS/EE programs.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants
admission_requirements.degree: BSc in CS, EE or related

name: University of Augsburg
description: Younger comprehensive university with strong CS and applied informatics programs. Location in Bavaria's third largest city with great quality of life and affordable living costs.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Ulm
description: Technical-focus university with top-ranked CS, EE and quantum computing research. Known for collaboration with Daimler and Bosch. Strong in neural information processing.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants
admission_requirements.degree: BSc in CS, Maths or Engineering

name: TU Braunschweig
description: Germany's oldest technical university, part of TU9 alliance. Strong in aerospace, automotive, CS and electrical engineering. Close collaboration with VW and Volkswagen Financial Services.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Kaiserslautern-Landau (RPTU)
description: Strong technical university, home to DFKI (German Research Center for AI) — the world's largest AI research center by staff. Exceptional for AI, ML and software engineering.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants
admission_requirements.degree: BSc in CS, Maths or Engineering

name: University of Bayreuth
description: Focused university with strong programs in law, economics and computer science. Known for RISCAL Bayreuth risk research and African Studies. Affordable Bavarian university with good rankings.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Passau
description: Compact and focused university with internationally oriented CS programs taught in English. Known for IT security, AI and European studies. Extremely international student body (30%+).

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Leibniz University Hannover
description: Large comprehensive technical university, strong in mechanical and electrical engineering, CS and architecture. Named after Gottfried Leibniz. Known for L3S Research Center for web science.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: TU Dortmund University
description: Technical university strong in CS, statistics and data science. Home to the Collaborative Research Centre for Machine Learning. Part of the University Alliance Ruhr.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Kassel
description: Interdisciplinary university with strong renewable energy, computer science and mechanical engineering programs. Center for Germany's renewable energy industry.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin (HTW Berlin)
name_german: Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin
description: One of Berlin's largest applied sciences universities. Strong practical focus in computer science, engineering and business. High employability with good industry connections in the Berlin tech scene.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Frankfurt University of Applied Sciences
description: Practice-oriented university in Germany's financial capital. Strong in computer science, engineering and business. Great internship and job placement in Frankfurt's finance and tech sectors.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Ostfalia University of Applied Sciences
description: Large applied sciences university near Volkswagen's HQ. Multiple campuses across Lower Saxony. Strong in automotive software, electrical engineering and computer science.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Nuremberg Institute of Technology
name_german: Technische Hochschule Nürnberg Georg Simon Ohm
description: Bavaria's largest applied sciences university with strong CS, EE and mechanical engineering programs. Located in Nuremberg with strong industry ties to Siemens, Adidas and Schaeffler.

name: Hochschule Heilbronn
description: Applied sciences university with strong automotive and business informatics programs. Located in the center of Germany's automotive industry triangle. Home to Lidl, Schwarz and Bechtle headquarters nearby.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Karlsruhe University of Applied Sciences (HKA)
description: Practice-oriented university in Germany's tech valley. Strong CS, EE and mechatronics programs with direct KIT collaboration. Good English-taught programs and high job placement.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Hochschule RheinMain
name_german: Hochschule RheinMain University of Applied Sciences
description: Applied sciences university in the Frankfurt/Rhine-Main region with strong media informatics, design informatics and CS programs. Close to major employers in the financial capital area.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: Deggendorf Institute of Technology
description: Fast-growing applied sciences university with strong international focus. Offers many English-taught MSc programs in AI, cybersecurity, and engineering. Highly accessible for international students.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Applied Sciences Upper Austria
description: Top Austrian FH for software engineering, AI and embedded systems. Hagenberg Campus is one of Europe's best applied IT campuses. Strong connections to the Austrian tech industry.

admission_requirements.aps: Not required (Austria)

name: Bielefeld University
description: Excellence university known for interdisciplinary research. Strong in cognitive science, bioinformatics and CS. Innovative open-plan campus design. Good English-taught graduate programs.

admission_requirements.degree: BSc in CS, Maths or Biology

name: University of Jena
description: Historic excellence university strong in photonics, optics, life sciences and computer science. Jena is Germany's optics capital — home to Zeiss, Jenoptik and Schott headquarters.

admission_requirements.aps: APS certificate required for Indian applicants

name: University of Würzburg
description: Excellence initiative university strong in computer science, robotics and medical AI. CAIDAS (Center for AI and Data Science) is a leading AI research hub.

admission_requirements.degree: BSc in CS, Maths or Engineering
